name: single_tool_success
description: Simple workflow with one deterministic tool call.

name: multi_tool_linear
description: Three-tool linear chain with data handoff.

name: conditional_branch
description: Branching workflow where one branch is taken based on validation.

name: retry_after_tool_failure
description: Injected transient tool failure; system should recover via retry.

name: degraded_fallback
description: Primary tool unavailable; fallback tool should complete task.

name: long_context_summary
description: Large context input requiring chunk + summarize behavior.

name: parallel_subtasks
description: Parallelizable subtasks aggregated into a final answer.
